pages.text: Vampires are humans that have been cursed and converted to blood-drinking, immortal beings, by a transfusion of demon-tainted blood. Not only $(item)Villagers$() and $(l:creatures/village_guard)Village Guards$(/l), but $(item)Players$() can also be cursed with $(l:observations/vampirism)Vampirism$(/l).

pages.title: Killing Vampires
pages.text: A vampire is very hard to kill, being immortal an all. $(item)Fire$(), $(item)sunlight$() or the attacks from $(l:creatures/werewolf)Werewolves$(/l) or other Vampires are the only known ways to kill one.$(p)A Vampire will typically stay near its $(l:artifacts/devices/coffin)Coffin$(/l) during the day, and at night will seek out the nearest village, and feed, returning to its Coffin when full.
